name: Bu Xuan
page_title: Bu Xuan 步璿 [Wu, Jin] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Youngest son of Bu Zhi, when Bu Chan feared he was going to be punished and defected to Jin, Bu Xuan was sent to Luoyang and given rank. Lü Kuang attacked Bu Chan’s city, the Jin reinforcements were defeated and the city fell, with most of the Bu family being killed but Bu Xuan, whose line would survive in Luoyang.

full_text:
Bu Xuan 步璿
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bu Xuan (步璿)was born in Xiling. Youngest son of Bu Zhi, he took part in Bu Chan’s defection to Jin. Bu Xuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Youngest son of Bu Zhi, when Bu Chan feared he was going to be punished and defected to Jin, Bu Xuan was sent to Luoyang and given rank. Lü Kuang attacked Bu Chan’s city, the Jin reinforcements were defeated and the city fell, with most of the Bu family being killed but Bu Xuan, whose line would survive in Luoyang.
